title: 'YES! Come play!' — group welcome (Nano Banana group-shot locked, v2)
preRenderNote: Composition is anchored by the Nano Banana 3-character group still (group_ep13_clip16_welcome.png). Sara (pink helmet, arms wide welcoming), Eva (teal helmet, hands cupped at mouth), Isabel (no helmet, hands clasped at chest, distinctively brunette curly hair). Locks the count at exactly 3 + visual differentiators (helmets vs no helmet, blonde vs brunette).
prompt: Wide shot — soft warm afternoon light. POSITION LOCK — exactly THREE girls in the frame, all stationary throughout the entire 10s. @Sara stands CENTER-LEFT with both feet planted, pink kid-bike helmet buckled on her head, both arms held out wide in welcome gesture. @Eva stands CENTER-RIGHT on the ground with both feet planted next to Sara, teal kid-bike helmet buckled, both hands cupped softly at her mouth. @Isabel stands FAR-RIGHT on the court with both feet planted a few steps from Eva, NO helmet, brunette curly hair, both hands clasped softly at her chest. Helmets stay on throughout. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara (warm cheerful kid-voice, sing-song bright): "YES! Come play with us!" Eva (cheerful sing-song call): "We have a tennis ball! Catch it with us!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Isabel (kind kindergartener voice, warm and shy with delight): "Yay! Thank you! What do we play first?" Sara (cheerful kid-voice): "TAG! Everyone's IT!" All three stay grounded with both feet planted on the ground throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no running, no walking. Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout.
